推荐场景: 酒店前台｜确认房卡与房间号
60秒任务: 「房卡和房间」：入住/房间/服务时间确认；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 入住｜房间信息｜服务时间｜小问题｜礼貌请求
场景族: 酒店前台｜房间｜早餐区｜机场｜旅行服务台
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
My key card doesn’t work.（房卡问题）
Which floor is my room on?（询问楼层）
My room is on the ___ floor.（说明楼层）
The room number is ___.（房号）
Is this the right room?（确认房间）
The door won’t open.（门打不开）
Can you check my key card?（检查房卡）
I left my bag in the room.（说明物品）
The bathroom is small but clean.（描述房间）
Can I have another towel?（请求用品）
The light is not working.（设施问题）
I need help with the door.（求助）
Please show me the way.（带路）
The elevator is next to the lobby.（位置）
Thank you, I found it.（任务完成）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: key card, room, floor, door, lobby, elevator, towel, bathroom, light, bag
Verbs: work, open, check, show, find, leave, help
Adjectives: right, wrong, clean, small, quiet, broken
Time / Place: first floor, second floor, next to, near, upstairs, downstairs
Chunks: key card, room number, hotel lobby, another towel, not working
